cooperates.cooperate_desc: Moskov works well with tanks like Tigreal or Atlas who can group enemies for his piercing attacks. He also synergizes with mages that can poke from range while he deals sustained damage.

counters.counter_desc: Moskov is countered by assassins like Ling, Helcurt, and Lancelot who can bypass his range and burst him down. He also struggles against heroes with heavy crowd control like Chou or Aurora who can lock him in place.

dominants.dominant_desc: Position behind tanks and use basic attacks to pierce through enemies. Use Skill 2 to push enemies into walls for stuns. Stay back in team fights and let your range advantage work. Save Flicker for emergency escapes. Focus on objectives after winning fights.

emblems.emblem_desc: Fighter Emblem provides sustain and damage for Moskov. Swift increases attack speed. Bargain Hunter saves gold. Quantum Charge heals and boosts speed on every basic attack. The bonus Spell Vamp, Adaptive Attack, and defenses make him tankier while maintaining damage output.

equips.equip_desc: This build balances damage and survivability for Moskov. Corrosion Scythe slows enemies and boosts HP. Tough Boots reduce crowd control duration. Golden Staff converts attack speed to damage. Demon Hunter Sword adds physical penetration and lifesteal. Malefic Gun increases range and damage. Rose Gold Meteor provides a lifesaving shield when low on HP.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker gives Moskov the escape he desperately needs as an immobile marksman. Use it to blink through walls when ganked, reposition in team fights, or aggressively chase low-health enemies. Pro tip: Combine Flicker with Spear of Death to push enemies into walls for guaranteed stuns. Save it for critical moments—the defense buff can save you from assassin burst damage.

data.title: Critic moskov

hero.hero_overview: Moskov's Basic Attacks can penetrate the target and deal (+68% Total Physical Attack)-(+110% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies behind them. Each Basic Attack hit reduces the cooldowns of Abyss Walker and Spear of Misery by 0.8s.
hero.hero_strength: Moskov's primary strength in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang lies in his high mobility and burst damage potential through his ability to blink, stun, and deal significant physical damage with his ultimate. He excels at dishing out damage, controlling the flow of the game with his mobility, and quickly eliminating enemy heroes.
hero.hero_weakness: Moskov's primary weaknesses in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (MLBB) include his squishiness, reliance on his ultimate's timing, and vulnerability to crowd control and early game pressure. He also lacks innate escape mechanisms and can be easily caught out of position.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Attack Speed & DPS Advantage: Moskov excels in extended fights due to his high attack speed and mobility. Granger, by contrast, relies on burst damage with his enhanced basic attacks and ultimate. If Moskov survives the initial burst, he can quickly melt Granger with continuous damage.

counters.counter_desc: Attack Speed Advantage: Moskov's passive and attack speed scale fast, allowing him to out-DPS Harith in many duels if positioned correctly and itemized well (e.g., Demon Hunter Sword, Golden Staff).

dominants.dominant_desc:
1. Positioning is Key: Moskov relies heavily on positioning to deal damage without getting caught. Make sure to always stand behind your team or minions to avoid enemy crowd control and engage from a safe distance.

2. Use Spear of Destruction (1st Skill) Wisely: This skill can hit multiple enemies, so always aim to use it in the right direction for maximum damage. It can also be used to poke enemy laners, but be mindful of its cooldown.

3. Last Hit Minions: Focus on last-hitting minions to gain gold efficiently and avoid pushing the lane unnecessarily. Moskov can clear waves well, but pushing too fast can leave you vulnerable to ganks.

4. Watch for Ganks: Always keep an eye on the minimap and maintain good positioning in the lane. Since Moskov is fragile, ganks can quickly put you behind. Be prepared to use your Flicker or other escape abilities if necessary.

5. Itemization: Early on, build damage items like Berserker's Fury or Scarlet Phantom to maximize your damage output. After getting some basic attack items, consider defensive items like Wind of Nature to counter enemy assassins.

6. Set Up Vision: Place wards in key areas to avoid surprise attacks. This allows you to stay safe and farm in peace.
dominants.dominant_title: Positioning is Crucial: Stay behind your tank or fighter. Moskov has short attack range, so bad positioning makes you easy prey.

emblems.emblem_desc:
1. Physical Attack and Attack Speed

Moskov relies heavily on basic attacks to deal damage quickly and consistently.

The Marksman Emblem offers bonus Physical Attack and Attack Speed, which synergizes with Moskov's passive (Spear of Quiescence) and skills, allowing him to pierce enemies and reduce cooldowns faster.

2. Key Talent Choices (Recommended):

Tier 1: Swift - Increases attack speed to maximize DPS.

Tier 2: Weapon Master or Doom

Weapon Master boosts Physical Attack from items.

Doom increases Crit Damage, if you're building crit items.

Tier 3: Weakness Finder or Killing Spree

Weakness Finder gives a chance to slow enemies and reduce their attack speed useful for chasing and dueling.

Killing Spree restores HP and gives movement speed on kill - better for snowballing and sustain.

3. Why Not Assassin or Jungle Emblems?

Assassin gives burst damage, but Moskov thrives more with sustained DPS.

Jungle is okay for farming, but if you're not playing as jungler, it's less efficient overall.

Would you like a build suggestion or emblem setup visual?

equips.equip_desc:
1. Swift Boots

Why: Early attack speed and movement speed to help in laning and early aggression.

2. Demon Hunter Sword (DHS)

Why: Increases damage based on enemy HP, synergizes with high attack speed. Perfect for shredding tanks.

3. Golden Staff

Why: Converts critical chance to attack speed and enhances effects of passive items (like DHS). A must for any attack-speed-focused build.

4. Corrosion Scythe

Why: Boosts attack speed and applies a slowing effect, helping Moskov chase or kite effectively.

5. Wind of Nature

Why: Offers physical lifesteal and an active ability that grants immunity to physical damage, great for survival in duels.

6. Malefic Roar or Blade of Despair

Why: Malefic Roar pierces armor (vs. tanks); Blade of Despair gives a massive damage boost when enemies are low on HP.

hero.hero_overview:
Skills

1. Passive Spear of Quiescence

Moskov's basic attacks and skills can pierce through enemies in a straight line. Each successful hit reduces the cooldown of his other skills.

2. Skill 1 Abyss Walker

Moskov blinks to a designated location and increases his attack speed for a short period. His next basic attacks will deal more damage and still pierce enemies.

3. Skill 2-Spear of Misery

Moskov throws a spear that knocks back the first enemy it hits. If the enemy collides with a wall or another enemy, they are stunned.

4. Ultimate - Spear of Destruction

Moskov hurls a giant spear in a straight line across the map, dealing damage to all enemies it passes through. It deals less damage to non-hero units.
hero.hero_strength:
Fast attack speed and piercing basic attacks

Can reposition easily with Skill 1

Crowd control potential with Skill 2

Long-range global ultimate for cleanup or teamfight impact
hero.hero_weakness:
Requires good positioning and aim

Relatively squishy and vulnerable to burst damage

Weak early game compared to some other marksmen

Would you like a recommended build or emblem setup for Moskov?

spell.spell_desc:
Enhanced Basic Attacks: For up to 8 basic attacks within the next 5 seconds, your hero's attack speed is increased to 1.5 times, and the attack speed cap is raised to 500%.

Physical Defense Penetration: Each of these enhanced basic attacks ignores 8 plus 1 per hero level of the target's physical defense.

Health Restoration: Each basic attack restores 60 plus 15% of your total physical attack and 15% of your total magic power as HP.

Cooldown: The spell has a cooldown of 75 seconds.

Strategic Usage

Inspire is particularly effective when used by heroes who benefit from increased attack speed and sustained damage output.

Marksmen like Layla, Moskov, and Irithel can leverage this spell to maximize their damage during crucial moments. Fighters such as Zilong and Aldous also benefit from the attack speed boost and health restoration, allowing them to sustain longer in battles.

Timing is crucial when using Inspire. Activating it during key engagements, such as team fights or when taking down objectives like turrets or the Lord, can provide a significant advantage. It's important to note that the spell's effects are limited to 8 basic attacks or 5 seconds, whichever comes first, so using it at the optimal moment is essential for maximizing its benefits.

By understanding and effectively utilizing Inspire, players can enhance their hero's performance and gain a strategic edge in

battles.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Can group enemies with his Ultimate (Implosion), making it easier for Moskov to deal AoE damage and stun multiple targets.
His Fatal Links (Ultimate) pulls enemies together, letting Moskov unleash his penetrating basic attacks on the entire team.
Can buff Moskov with shields and extra damage while diving enemies.

counters.counter_desc: His silence (Passive & Ultimate) prevents Moskov from using skills, making him an easy target.
His Ultimate (Kings Calling) disables Moscovs dash (Skill 1 Abyss Walker), making him an easy target.
His Shadow Kill (Ultimate) can kill Moskov instantly if he is alone.

dominants.dominant_desc:
-Moskov gains access to his Ultimate Spear of Destruction, allowing him to secure kills from long range. 
-Early game is weak, but at level 4 his attack speed starts improving. 
-If an enemy escapes with low HP, snipe them across the map using your Spear of Destruction. 
-Position yourself near jungle walls to easily land your Spear of Misery (Skill 2) stun. 
-Build Haas Claws early for lifesteal. Combined with Inspire, this will keep you alive in fights! 
-Moskov needs items, so prioritize Gold Lane and farm safely until you hit your power spikes. 
-Moskov is a late-game hyper-carry, so dont rush fights early. Once you have attack speed, crit, and lifesteal, you can dominate fights, kite enemies, and shred entire teams. 
♡ Good luck!! ♡

emblems.emblem_desc: Most balanced setup! Helping Moskov sustain in fights, farm, chase enemies, and deal high DPS. ♡

equips.equip_desc:
-A Crit and Regen build makes Moskov a self-sustaining, high-burst Marksman who can shred enemies, heal fast, and dominate fights. 
-It enhances his burst damage, sustain, and overall DPS.
-This build allows him to hit harder, heal more, and stay longer in fights.
Optional Items for Survival ♡

hero.hero_overview:
-Known for his high attack speed, mobility, and ability to penetrate enemy lines with his spear attacks. 
-Moskov excels in team fights by dealing AoE damage with his basic attacks while controlling enemies with his knockback and stun abilities. 
-If farmed well, he can carry games with his high burst damage and mobility.
hero.hero_strength:
-High attack speed and penetration, 
-Strong late-game damage potential, 
-Good mobility with Abyss Walker,
-Crowd control with Spear of Misery.
hero.hero_weakness:
-Weak early game and reliant on farm, 
-Squishy and vulnerable to assassins,
-Requires good positioning for maximum effectiveness.

-Moskov relies on basic attack damage rather than skills for damage output.
-Inspire drastically boosts his attack speed and reduces attack cooldown, letting him shred enemies even faster.
-Inspire is the best battle spell for Moskov because it amplifies his greatest strength, high attack speed and DPS.
-It makes him deadlier in fights, enhances his sustain, and helps him push objectives efficiently.

counters.counter_desc: In our counters, we will focus on any enemy that deals long-range damage, as we must prioritize being close due to our attack range.

dominants.dominant_desc: Here, we will focus on farming and helping with assists in the early game. In the mid and late game, we will try to wait for the weaker enemies behind the bushes to finish them off with a single combo. This way, we can farm faster and have our build ready, as we depend heavily on our intelligence and the damage from the build.

emblems.emblem_desc: We will use penetration to get that extra boost that will allow us to break armor and be tougher against tanks. Then, we will focus on equipment scaling, as being a non-meta hero, he is somewhat neglected and does not have much damage. Lastly, we will use the Quantum Charge ability to gain that extra speed during key moments of our basic attacks

equips.equip_desc: The DPS builds are popular, but they're not worth it. It's better to have less DPS but more damage, and this build has everything needed to perform perfect combos.

hero.hero_overview: Moskov is a weak hero at the beginning, but if we maintain a safe distance and try to control the lane, we can assist and then power up for the kills.
hero.hero_strength: Moskov's strength depends on his equipment, as with how nerfed he is, it's necessary to take advantage of the build.

data.recommend: You have to love Moskov to use him perfectly. Once you get the hang of him, everything will be easy.

spell.spell_desc: We will use Inspire because this ability will help us in critical moments during the mid or late game. It will also be very useful in the early game to surprise weaker enemies.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Basic common: memiliki efek regan mana +12, karena Moskov sangat boros terhadap mana dan memiliki max hp yang rendah, makan emblem ini sangat cocok untuk Moskov.
Swift: Memiliki efek: 10% attack speed, Moskov memiliki attack speed yang rendah di early game ini akan sangat membantu pada fase lanning.
Tenacity: Memiliki efek pertahanan saat hp rendah sebesar 15%. Pada saat hp Moskov rendah, talent ini akan membantu moskov untuk meningkatkan pertahanannya.
Quantum charge. Memiliki efek movement speed dan heal hp. Efek ini sangat berguna bagi Moskov dikarenakan mobilitas yang relatif tinggi.

equips.equip_desc: Attack speed tinggi, efek CC singkat, dan pertahanan diri.

hero.hero_overview: Moskov merupakan hero marksman tier A pada meta kali ini. Pada awal pertandingan, cukup bermain aman dari jangkauan karena Moskov sangat lemah di early game. Waspada dengan ganking dari lawan, selalu perhatikan map dan hal yang utama untuk Moskov adalah selalu last hit minion untuk mendapatkan gold yang maksimal.
hero.hero_strength: Dalam fase lanning, Moskov sangat unggul dikarenakan memiliki pasif menembus minion kebelakang dan jika hero musuh berani untuk mendekat maka gunakan skill 2 (spear of misery) untuk mendorong lawan dan jika skil ini tertancap ke tembok maka akan menyebabkan efek stun selama 1,8 detik. Di mid game, ingat untuk selalu rekan tim untuk memenangkan team fight. Jangan ragu untuk rotasi ke lane lain yang membutuhkan bantuan gank. Saat terjadi team fight, cari posisi aman agar terhindar dari serangan musuh posisikan diri dibelakang tank dan gunakan metode tarik ulur. Jika ada hero lawan yang mencoba kabur, gunakan skil 3 (spear of destruction) untuk menombak lawan dan berpindah posisi ke arah target. Di late game, pastikan Moskov tidak melakukan blunder karena Moskov merupakan peran penting untuk team fight. makro map, counter lawan, dan kesabaran merupakan kunci kemenangan menggunakan moskov.
hero.hero_weakness: Moskov sangat lemah dengan tipikal Hero burst damage besar seperti: saber, natalia, eudora dan hero burst damage lainnya. Dominan ice dan blade armor adalah 2 item counter dari moskov. Dominan ice memiliki efek pengurangan attack speed dan blade armor memiliki efek memantulkan damage kembali. Efek crownd control tinggi seperti: suppress, airborn, stun, dan slow efek sangat menggangu moskov saat teamfight.

spell.spell_desc: Purify sangat cocok untuk Moskov, saat teamfight terjadi, spell ini akan sangat berguna karena memiliki efek anti CC dan Moskov akan leluasa untuk menyerang lawan

Protection: Tigreal absorbs damage, allowing Moskov to deal damage safely.

Team Fight Setup: Tigreal groups enemies together, maximizing Moskov's AOE damage potential.

Laning Support: Tigreal helps zone enemies, enabling Moskov to farm effectively and secure early kills.


Together, they create a strong combo for dominating both lanes and team fights!

Range Advantage: Eudora can poke from a distance, making it difficult for Moskov to engage.

Zone Control: Eudora can control team fights, forcing Moskov to play cautiously.


These factors make Eudora a significant threat to Moskov in battles

dominants.dominant_desc:
Tips & Tricks: Farm efficiently, use Spear of Misery (Skill 2) for stuns, position attacks to hit multiple enemies, and use Flicker for mobility.

Laning Precautions: Stay in gold lane, avoid overextending, ward bushes, build sustain early, and wait for power spikes before fighting.

Team Fight Strategy: Stay backline, use Skill 2 for CC, hit multiple targets, use Ultimate for poke/finishes, target enemy carries, and reposition constantly.


Master these, and Moskov will be unstoppable!

emblems.emblem_desc:
Using the Marksman Emblem on Moskov in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang is a strategic choice that significantly enhances his effectiveness as a high-damage marksman. This emblem set is tailored specifically for heroes like Moskov, focusing on attributes that maximize their damage potential in combat.

Increased Physical Attack

One of the primary benefits of the Marksman Emblem is the boost it provides to physical attack. This enhancement directly increases Moskov's damage output, allowing him to deal more damage with his basic attacks and abilities. Given that Moskov relies heavily on his auto-attacks, especially in the late game, this boost is crucial for shredding through enemy heroes and objectives.

Critical Damage and Chance

The Marksman Emblem also offers talents that enhance critical damage and increase critical chance. For Moskov, this is particularly beneficial as it allows him to deal substantial burst damage when his critical hits land. With the right item build, these critical hits can turn the tide of battles, making him a lethal threat in team fights.

Boosted Attack Speed

Another significant advantage of the Marksman Emblem is the increase in attack speed. Moskov benefits greatly from higher attack speed due to his passive ability, Spear of Quiescence, which allows his basic attacks to penetrate through enemies. This means that with faster attack speeds, Moskov can hit multiple targets quickly, maximizing his damage potential in team fights.

Synergistic Talents

The emblem also provides flexibility through talents like Killing Spree, which grants healing and movement speed upon securing kills, enhancing Moskov's survivability. Alternatively, High and Dry increases damage against isolated enemies, allowing him to pick off squishy targets with ease.

Conclusion

Overall, the Marksman Emblem is the optimal choice for Moskov, enhancing his strengths as a damage dealer and enabling him to thrive in battles. By utilizing this emblem set, players can maximize

equips.equip_desc:
1. Increased Attack Speed

A speed build focuses on items that significantly boost attack speed, allowing Moskov to unleash rapid basic attacks. Since his passive ability, Spear of Quiescence, allows basic attacks to penetrate through enemies, a higher attack speed means he can hit multiple targets quickly, maximizing his damage potential in team fights.

2. Enhanced Damage Output

With increased attack speed, Moskov can deal more damage over time, especially when combined with critical chance items. The synergy between high attack speed and critical damage allows him to burst down enemies more effectively, making him a significant threat in both skirmishes and full-team engagements.

3. Greater Mobility and Positioning

A speed build often incorporates items that provide movement speed or additional mobility options. This enhances Moskov's ability to reposition during battles, dodge skill shots, and escape from dangerous situations. Improved mobility also enables him to chase down fleeing enemies or reposition quickly in team fights to maximize damage.

4. Effective Farming and Wave Clearing

In the early game, a speed build allows Moskov to farm minion waves more efficiently. Faster attacks enable him to clear waves quickly, gaining gold and experience rapidly. This helps him reach his core items sooner, allowing him to scale into the late game more effectively.

5. Improved Team Fight Contribution

With higher attack speed and mobility, Moskov can contribute more effectively in team fights. He can quickly reposition to avoid danger while maintaining a high damage output, making him a vital asset to his team.

Conclusion

Opting for a speed build on Moskov enhances his attack speed, damage output, mobility, and overall effectiveness in battles. By focusing on speed, players can maximize Moskov's potential as a marksman, ensuring he remains a dominant force throughout the game.

hero.hero_overview:
Moskov is a marksman hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang known for his high attack speed, strong late-game damage, and ability to penetrate multiple enemies with his attacks. His kit makes him a deadly force in both team fights and split pushing.

Moskov's Skills

1. Passive - Spear of Quiescence

Basic attacks can penetrate targets, dealing damage to enemies behind them.

Reduces skill cooldowns when successfully hitting an enemy.



2. Skill 1 - Abyss Walker

Moskov dashes in a target direction, increasing his attack speed and enhancing his basic attacks.



3. Skill 2 - Spear of Misery

Throws a spear that knocks back and stuns enemies if they collide with obstacles.



4. Ultimate - Spear of Destruction

Launches a giant spear across the map, dealing damage to all enemies it passes through.
hero.hero_strength:
Moskov's Strengths (Mobile Legends: Bang Bang)

1. High Attack Speed & DPS

Moskov has one of the fastest attack speeds in the game, especially with Abyss Walker (Skill 1), making him a strong damage dealer in extended fights.



2. Piercing Basic Attacks

His passive allows his basic attacks to penetrate enemies, dealing damage to multiple targets in a straight line, which is great for team fights and wave clearing.



3. Strong Late-Game Scaling

Once Moskov gets core items like Demon Hunter Sword and Golden Staff, he can shred through tanks and squishy enemies with insane attack speed and lifesteal.



4. Good Mobility

Abyss Walker lets him dash and reposition, helping him chase enemies or escape dangerous situations.



5. Stun Potential with Skill 2

Spear of Misery can knock enemies into walls for a long stun, giving him a strong crowd control ability if positioned well.



6. Long-Range Ultimate

Spear of Destruction can hit enemies across the map, allowing him to finish off escaping enemies or assist teammates from afar.
hero.hero_weakness:
Moskov has several weaknesses that players need to be aware of to maximize his potential and avoid getting shut down.

Moskov's Weaknesses

1. Weak Early Game

Moskov has low base damage and relies on items to scale, making him vulnerable in the early game.

He struggles against aggressive early-game marksmen like Brody or Beatrix.



2. Short Attack Range

Compared to other marksmen, Moskov has a shorter attack range, making it risky to engage in fights.

He needs to get close to enemies, which makes him vulnerable to crowd control and burst damage.



3. Squishy and Easily Bursted

Like most marksmen, Moskov has low HP and can be easily eliminated by assassins (e.g., Ling, Hayabusa) or mages (e.g., Eudora, Kagura).



4. Highly Dependent on Positioning

If positioned poorly, Moskov can get caught and killed quickly.

He relies on his Skill 2 (Spear of Misery) to stun enemies by knocking them into walls, which requires good positioning and timing.



5. Vulnerable to Crowd Control (CC)

Stuns, slows, and suppressions can prevent Moskov from attacking or escaping.

Heroes with strong CC (e.g., Franco, Kaja, Khufra) can easily shut him down.



6. Item Dependent

Moskov needs attack speed and critical damage items to be effective.

Without core items like Demon Hunter Sword or Golden Staff, his damage output is low.




How to Counter Moskov

Pick long-range marksmen (e.g., Lesley, Beatrix, Claude) to poke him from a safe distance.

Use crowd control heroes (e.g., Franco, Khufra, Kaja) to prevent him from dealing damage.

Shut him down early by applying lane pressure and denying farm.

Ambush him in team fights before he can position himself properly.

spell.spell_desc:
Using Flicker on Moskov in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang can significantly enhance his gameplay, allowing players to maximize his potential in both offensive and defensive situations. Flicker is a versatile battle spell that provides a short-distance blink, offering strategic advantages that align perfectly with Moskov's skill set.

Key Reasons to Use Flicker on Moskov

1. Enhanced Mobility: Moskov's natural playstyle requires him to be in the right position to deal damage effectively. Flicker allows him to quickly reposition during skirmishes, dodging incoming threats or escaping dangerous situations. This mobility is crucial for avoiding crowd control and burst damage from enemies.


2. Chasing and Securing Kills: Moskov is a high-damage marksman, especially in the late game. Flicker can be used to close the gap on fleeing enemies, enabling him to unleash his rapid attacks and secure crucial kills. This is particularly effective when combined with his ultimate, Spear of Destruction, allowing him to finish off low-health opponents from a distance.


3. Surprise Attacks: Flicker can be utilized to initiate surprise attacks on unsuspecting enemies. By flickering behind an enemy and using Spear of Misery (Skill 2) to knock them into a wall, Moskov can stun his target, creating opportunities for his team to capitalize on.


4. Escaping CC and Ganks: Moskov is vulnerable to crowd control effects, which can hinder his ability to deal damage. Flicker serves as a reliable escape tool, allowing him to evade dangerous situations, such as being caught by a Franco's hook or an assassin's burst.



In summary, using Flicker on Moskov provides critical advantages in mobility, positioning, and survivability. By incorporating Flicker into his gameplay, players can enhance Moskov's effectiveness, ensuring he remains a dominant force throughout the match.
